betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Tracking Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:1) is the §6navigation-oriented circuit board§f in the AR progression. It is built into every machine that needs to know the §6position§f, §6velocity§f, or §6destination§f of a moving entity — the §6Guidance Computer§f (10028), the §6Planet Holo Selector§f (chain), the §6Docking Pad§f (10023), and every satellite launcher.

§6Production Path (trackingcircuit.json)§f:
- Machine: §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) at 900 ticks
- Input: 1x §6dustRedstone§f (forge:ore_dict), 1x §6Eye of Ender§f (minecraft:ender_eye), 1x §6Basic Circuit Plate§f (advancedrocketry:itemcircuitplate:0)
- Output: 1x §6Tracking Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:1)
- Energy: 50 RF/t
- The §6Eye of Ender§f is the §6unique ingredient§f — it cannot be substituted

The tracking circuit provides §6directional awareness§f to machines: the §6Guidance Computer§f uses it to lock onto a destination, the §6Docking Pad§f uses it to align with rockets, the §6Planet Holo Selector§f uses it to track satellite positions, and the §6Rocket Monitoring Station§f (10033) uses it to display fleet status.

The tracking circuit is a prerequisite for the §6Guidance Computer§f (10028), the §6Docking Pad§f (10023), the §6Holographic Planet Selector§f (chain), the §6Orbital Laser Drill§f (chain), and the §6Railgun§f (chain). It is also used by the §6Beacon§f (chain) and the §6Microwave Transmitter§f satellite module.

§eTip§f: The §6Eye of Ender§f is the §6bottleneck ingredient§f — blaze powder + ender pearl. Build a §6Blaze Farm§f and an §6Enderman Farm§f before starting this quest in bulk. The Tracking Circuit is the §6most-demanded circuit board§f in AR: aim for at least 32 in storage before any serious rocket construction.
